# Desk Mat Care FAQ

## Cleaning

Wipe the mat with a damp cloth and a drop of mild soap, then air dry flat. Machine washing warps the stitched edge and voids the two year warranty.

## Returns

You can still return an opened mat, but once the packaging seal is broken a restocking deduction comes off the refund. Keep the original box if you think you might send it back.
